content: Active round state lives exclusively in Zustand roundStore (persisted to localStorage), not in Supabase or TanStack Query cache. This is the offline-safe source of truth during a round. Only flush to Supabase on round completion via finishRound(). Never try to query Supabase for in-progress hole data during an active round.

TypeScript verbatimModuleSyntax is enabled (tsconfig). All React type imports must use 'import type' syntax: 'import { type ReactNode }', 'import { type HTMLAttributes }', etc. Value imports (useState, useEffect, forwardRef) do not need the type keyword. Build will fail otherwise.

name: routing-and-code-splitting
description: All pages use lazy() + Suspense via App.tsx. Route-level code splitting is automatic. Page components should be default exports. Bottom nav only renders on top-level routes and only when user is authenticated. /round/active is full-screen with no nav.
@googlemaps/js-api-loader v2 dropped the .load() method and changed option names. Also backgroundSync is not a valid Workbox GenerateSW option in vite-plugin-pwa v1.
resolution: Use standalone importLibrary() from the package and setOptions({ key, v: 'weekly' }). Access Autocomplete via window.google.maps.places.Autocomplete with @ts-expect-error. Remove backgroundSync from vite.config.ts workbox options.

description: setAuthLoading(false) was called immediately after getSession() resolved, before the async profile fetch completed. With user=null and authLoading=false, the router redirected to /auth while the lazy Auth page triggered Suspense, producing an infinite green loading screen. Also: no .catch() on getSession() meant any config error would hang forever.
resolution: When a session exists, call setAuthLoading(false) only inside the profile fetch's finally block (async/await pattern). When no session, call it immediately. Add .catch(() => setAuthLoading(false)) on the outer getSession() promise as a safety net.

description: onAuthStateChange only handled SIGNED_OUT. After signInWithPassword, navigate('/') fired before user state was set. Route guard saw user=null, redirected back to /auth — infinite loop.
resolution: Handle SIGNED_IN in onAuthStateChange by calling loadProfile() and setUser(). Remove manual navigate('/') from Auth.tsx — the route guard (user ? <Navigate to='/' />) handles the redirect automatically once setUser fires.

content: GolfCourseAPI.com is integrated via a Supabase Edge Function (course-search). The API key is stored as GOLF_COURSE_API_KEY secret. Results are cached in the courses table (api_course_id, slope_rating, course_rating columns). The client never hits the golf API directly — always via the Edge Function to protect the key and avoid CORS issues.

name: satellite-map-live-play
description: CourseMap.tsx is a full-screen overlay on RoundActive that shows Google Maps satellite view. Uses navigator.geolocation.watchPosition for live GPS, AdvancedMarkerElement with mapId DEMO_MAP_ID for markers, tap-to-place-flag for target, haversine formula for yard distance, and streams Angus shot advice via streamAIRequest('shot_advice', ...). courseLat/courseLng are stored in ActiveRoundState (roundStore) and passed down.

GolfCourseAPI.com returns empty results when the search query is too specific (e.g. 'Augusta National Golf Club'). Shorter queries work better (e.g. 'augusta' returns Port Augusta Golf Club). The API is a text search, not a course name exact-match — searching by the Google Places display name usually works.
resolution: This is expected API behavior. No fix needed — the user picks from the results list. Private/exclusive clubs like Augusta National may simply not be in the database.

description: AdvancedMarkerElement crosshair centering: 0-height wrapper is unreliable. Use height:22px + overflow:visible + translateY(-50%) on content div instead.
resolution: Set wrapper to height:22px, overflow:visible. Inner SVG div uses transform:translateY(-50%) to center visually at the lat/lng anchor.

description: Google Maps Polyline does not support strokeDasharray CSS property — it silently ignores it causing unexpected rendering.
resolution: Use icons[] array with a repeated path icon (path:'M 0,-1 0,1') to simulate dashes on a Polyline.

name: vaul-bottom-sheet
description: Use vaul (npm package) for the BottomSheet component. It correctly handles iOS-style scroll-vs-drag disambiguation natively — replaces manual touchmove/passive:false hacks.
gmpDragend event only fires once at end of drag — lines stay frozen while dragging the shot marker.
resolution: Listen to both 'drag' (fires every frame, updates refs + polylines) and 'dragend' (commits final pos to React state).

name: mediapipe-pose-swing-analysis
description: Swing analyzer uses MediaPipe PoseLandmarker (lite model, IMAGE mode) in src/lib/poseAnalysis.ts to extract 33-landmark pose data from recorded video frames. Samples every 0.13s, detects 7 swing phases by tracking lead wrist Y in world coordinates, computes 7 biomechanical metrics (shoulder/hip rotation, X-factor, lead arm angle, spine tilt, head drift, knee flex), then sends only numeric measurements to the ai-proxy Edge Function — no images sent to Claude. Phase images + 2D landmarks are stored in PhaseData for skeleton overlay rendering in SwingFeedback.tsx via DrawingUtils. WASM loaded from CDN to avoid Vite bundler issues (optimizeDeps.exclude set). Assumes right-handed golfer.

content: MediaPipe tasks-vision WASM must be loaded from CDN via FilesetResolver URL (not bundled). Add @mediapipe/tasks-vision to vite.config.ts optimizeDeps.exclude to prevent Vite from pre-bundling the WASM files. CDN version must match installed npm package version.

description: MediaPipe WASM CDN version in FilesetResolver URL is pinned to 0.10.14 but npm package installed is 0.10.35
resolution: Pin both to the same version. Update WASM_URL in src/lib/poseAnalysis.ts to use the same version as the installed npm package: cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/@mediapipe/tasks-vision@0.10.35/wasm

content: SwingAnalysis type now has two formats: new (summary, metrics: SwingMetric[], tips: SwingTip[]) from the MediaPipe pipeline, and legacy (overall, frames: SwingFrame[], tips: string[]) from pre-MediaPipe analyses stored in Supabase. Both Swing.tsx library list and SwingFeedback.tsx must handle both formats gracefully — use summary || overall for display text.

name: gps-plays-like-elevation
description: Plays Like elevation adjustment uses Open-Meteo /v1/elevation (free, no key) fetching two coordinates in one call. Computed as rawDist + (elevDiffFt × 1.0) uphill or rawDist + (elevDiffFt × 0.5) downhill (tour caddie standard). Results cached per hole number in elevCacheRef to avoid refetching. Cache is invalidated when pin moves.

content: ActiveHoleState now carries pinIsCustom (bool) and pinZone ('front'|'middle'|'back'|null) plus greenCenterLat/Lng, greenFrontLat/Lng, greenBackLat/Lng. roundStore.startRound auto-sets pinLat/pinLng from greenCenterLat/Lng; pinIsCustom stays false until the user moves the pin on the map.

CourseMap pin marker is gmpDraggable:true. Both 'drag' (real-time polyline update) and 'dragend' (commit to store + fire onPinSet) events are needed. onPinSet signature is (lat, lng, isCustom?: boolean).
